======================================================================================================================================

Data URI - (other apps won't work)

data://text/html;base64,

Instructions
    Copy the Data URi (triple click)
    Paste into URL bar
    Bookmark

======================================================================================================================================

HTML
Copy and run the HTML directly:

<button onclick='fetch("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/ltorl/dancing-bunny@main/public/v2.html") .then(response => response.text()) .then(text => { const newWin = window.open("about:blank", "_blank"); if (newWin) { newWin.document.open(); newWin.document.write(text); newWin.document.close(); } });' style="width:100%;height:100%;font-size:14;font-family:Comic Sans MS;"> click to open </button>

Instructions
    Copy Html (triple click)
    Paste into:
        W3Schools Tryit
        Code.org Web Lab
        OneCompiler
    Run the page

======================================================================================================================================

Bookmarklet

javascript:(function()%7Bfetch(%22https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fgh%2Fltorl%2Fdancing-bunny%40main%2Fpublic%2Fv2.html%22).then(response%20%3D%3E%20response.text()).then(text%20%3D%3E%20%7Bconst%20newWin%20%3D%20window.open(%22about%3Ablank%22%2C%20%22_blank%22)%3Bif%20(newWin)%20%7BnewWin.document.open()%3BnewWin.document.write(text)%3BnewWin.document.close()%3B%7D%7D)%7D)()

Instructions
    Copy the script (triple click)
    Right-click on bookmarks bar
    Click 'Paste'
    Run from any webpage (not new tab)
